zh.Braine, Soissons, Aisne, Picardie, Franc: 法國皮卡迪艾斯索頌斯布萊
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert III dit Gasteblé comte de Dreux於1185年出生在法國艾-吉洛易德時，他的父親Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braine31歲，母親Yolande de Coucy21歲。他和Aliénor de Saint-Valéry至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1234年3月3日在法國皮卡迪艾斯索頌斯布萊享年49歲，埋葬在法國皮卡迪艾斯布萊。

zh-hans.Braine, Soissons, Aisne, Picardie, Franc: 法国皮卡迪艾斯索頌斯布萊
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert III dit Gasteblé comte de Dreux于1185年出生在法国艾-吉洛易德时，他的父亲Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braine31岁，母亲Yolande de Coucy21岁。他和Aliénor de Saint-Valéry至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1234年3月3日在法国皮卡迪艾斯索頌斯布萊享年49岁，埋葬在法国皮卡迪艾斯布萊。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

nameMeanings.name: dit
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert III dit Gasteblé comte de Dreux was born in 1185, in Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, France, his father, Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braine, was 31 and his mother, Yolande de Coucy, was 21. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Aliénor de Saint-Valéry. He died on 3 March 1234, in Braine, Soissons, Aisne, Picardie, France, at the age of 49, and was buried in Braine, Aisne, Picardie, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert III dit Gasteblé comte de Dreux est né en 1185, à Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, France, son père, Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braine, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Yolande de Coucy, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Aliénor de Saint-Valéry. Il est décédé le 3 mars 1234, à Braine, Soissons, Aisne, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Braine, Aisne, Picardie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert III dit Gasteblé comte de Dreux 1185 in Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braine 31 und seine Mutter Yolande de Coucy 21. Er hatte mit Aliénor de Saint-Valéry mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 3. März 1234 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Braine, Soissons, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich und wurde in Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert III dit Gasteblé comte de Dreux è nato il nel 1185 nel Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Francia, il suo padre, Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braine, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Yolande de Coucy, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Aliénor de Saint-Valéry. Morì il 3 marzo 1234, nel Braine, Soissons, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Francia.

ja.Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Centre-Val de Loire: フランスセントアエウレ-エト-ロイルドレウックス
ja.lifeSummary: Robert III dit Gasteblé comte de Dreuxが1185年にフランスエウレ-エト-ロイルドレウックスで生まれた時，父Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braineは31歳，母Yolande de Coucyは21歳であった。彼はAliénor de Saint-Valéryとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1234年3月3日にフランスピカーディエイスンソイソンスブレアインで49歳で死去し，フランスピカーディエイスンブレアインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert III dit Gasteblé comte de Dreux(이)가 1185년 프랑스 우레-트-로이르 드레우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braine(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Yolande de Coucy(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Aliénor de Saint-Valéry(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1234년 3월 3일 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 소이손스 브레이인에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 브레이인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert III dit Gasteblé comte de Dreux nasceu em 1185, em Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, França, seu pai, Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braine, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Yolande de Coucy, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Aliénor de Saint-Valéry. Ele faleceu em 3 de março de 1234, em Braine, Soissons, Aisne, Picardie, França, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Braine, Aisne, Picardie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert III dit Gasteblé comte de Dreux родился в 1185 г. в местности дреукс, эуре-ет-лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braine было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Yolande de Coucy, 21. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Aliénor de Saint-Valéry. Он умер 3 марта 1234 г. в местности бреаин, соиссонс, эисн, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности бреаин, эисн, пикарди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert III dit Gasteblé comte de Dreux nació en 1185, en Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Francia, su papá, Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braine, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Yolande de Coucy, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Aliénor de Saint-Valéry. Murió el 3 de marzo de 1234, en Braine, Soissons, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Francia.
